mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.company_name, c.biz_reg_no, c.ceo_name, c.company_tel_no, c.ceo_mobile_no, c.zip_code, c.addr1, c.addr2, cr.channel_cd, cr.role_cd as admin_role_cd, b.member_grade_cd, b.meatmoney_balance_amt, b.credit_balance_amt, b.total_available_amt, b.month_order_amt, b.year_order_amt, b.total_order_amt, b.managing_channel_cd, s.seller_type_cd, s.tax_type_cd, sa.bank_cd, sa.account_no, sa.account_name FROM tb_member_master m LEFT JOIN tb_company_master c ON m.company_id = c.company_id LEFT JOIN tb_member_channel_role cr ON m.member_id = cr.member_id AND cr.use_yn = 'Y' AND cr.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN tb_buyer_profile b ON m.member_id = b.member_id LEFT JOIN tb_seller_profile s ON m.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN tb_seller_settlement_account sa ON m.member_id = sa.seller_member_id WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member_master SET channel_cd = #{channelCd}, company_name = #{companyName}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, biz_reg_no = #{bizRegNo}, company_tel_no = #{companyTelNo}, ceo_mobile_no = #{ceoMobileNo}, email = #{email}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, addr1 = #{addr1}, addr2 = #{addr2}, join_status_cd = #{joinStatusCd}, mod_id = #{modId}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE tb_buyer_profile SET member_grade_cd = #{memberGradeCd}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE tb_seller_profile SET seller_type_cd = #{sellerTypeCd}, tax_type_cd = #{taxTypeCd}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE tb_seller_settlement_account SET bank_cd = #{bankCd}, account_no = #{accountNo}, account_name = #{accountName}, mod_dt = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONTACT_ID as contactId, MEMBER_ID as memberId, NAME as name, MOBILE_NO as mobileNo, PHONE_NO as phoneNo, EMAIL as email, CONTACT_TYPE_CD as contactTypeCd FROM tb_member_contact WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT m.member_id, m.company_name, m.login_id FROM tb_member_master m WHERE m.member_type_cd = 'SELLER' AND m.join_status_cd = 'JOIN' ORDER BY m.company_name ASC

SELECT m.*, b.member_grade_cd, b.meatmoney_balance_amt, b.credit_balance_amt, b.total_available_amt, s.seller_type_cd, s.tax_type_cd, ap.admin_role_cd FROM tb_member_master m LEFT JOIN tb_buyer_profile b ON m.member_id = b.member_id LEFT JOIN tb_seller_profile s ON m.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN tb_admin_profile ap ON m.member_id = ap.member_id WHERE m.login_id = #{loginId} AND m.del_yn = 'N'
